CVE-2018-11496.title: In Long Range Zip (aka lrzip) 0.631, there is a use-after-free in ...
CVE-2018-11496.summary: In Long Range Zip (aka lrzip) 0.631, there is a use-after-free in read_stream in stream.c, because decompress_file in lrzip.c lacks certain size validation.

CVE-2019-10654.title: The lzo1x_decompress function in liblzo2.so.2 in LZO 2.10, as use ...
CVE-2019-10654.summary: The lzo1x_decompress function in liblzo2.so.2 in LZO 2.10, as used in Long Range Zip (aka lrzip) 0.631, allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (invalid memory read and application crash) via a crafted archive, a different vulnerability than CVE-2017-8845.

CVE-2020-25467.title: A null pointer dereference was discovered lzo_decompress_buf in s ...
CVE-2020-25467.summary: A null pointer dereference was discovered lzo_decompress_buf in stream.c in Irzip 0.621 which allows an attacker to cause a denial of service (DOS) via a crafted compressed file.

CVE-2021-27345.title: A null pointer dereference was discovered in ucompthread in strea ...
CVE-2021-27345.summary: A null pointer dereference was discovered in ucompthread in stream.c in Irzip 0.631 which allows attackers to cause a denial of service (DOS) via a crafted compressed file.

CVE-2021-27347.title: Use after free in lzma_decompress_buf function in stream.c in Irz ...
CVE-2021-27347.summary: Use after free in lzma_decompress_buf function in stream.c in Irzip 0.631 allows attackers to cause Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted compressed file.

CVE-2021-33451.title: An issue was discovered in lrzip version 0.641. There are memory  ...
CVE-2021-33451.summary: An issue was discovered in lrzip version 0.641. There are memory leaks in fill_buffer() in stream.c.

CVE-2021-33453.title: An issue was discovered in lrzip version 0.641. There is a use-af ...
CVE-2021-33453.summary: An issue was discovered in lrzip version 0.641. There is a use-after-free in ucompthread() in stream.c:1538.

CVE-2022-26291.title: lrzip v0.641 was discovered to contain a multiple concurrency use ...
CVE-2022-26291.summary: lrzip v0.641 was discovered to contain a multiple concurrency use-after-free between the functions zpaq_decompress_buf() and clear_rulist(). This vulnerability allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted Irz file.

CVE-2022-28044.title: Irzip v0.640 was discovered to contain a heap memory corruption v ...
CVE-2022-28044.summary: Irzip v0.640 was discovered to contain a heap memory corruption via the component lrzip.c:initialise_control.

CVE-2022-33067.title: Lrzip v0.651 was discovered to contain multiple invalid arithmeti ...
CVE-2022-33067.summary: Lrzip v0.651 was discovered to contain multiple invalid arithmetic shifts via the functions get_magic in lrzip.c and Predictor::init in libzpaq/libzpaq.cpp. These vulnerabilities allow attackers to cause a Denial of Service via unspecified vectors.

CVE-2023-39741.title: lrzip v0.651 was discovered to contain a heap overflow via the li ...
CVE-2023-39741.summary: lrzip v0.651 was discovered to contain a heap overflow via the libzpaq::PostProcessor::write(int) function at /libzpaq/libzpaq.cpp. This vulnerability allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted file.

CVE-2023-39743.summary: lrzip-next LZMA v23.01 was discovered to contain an access violation via the component /bz3_decode_block src/libbz3.c.
